---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for JapaneseOnChain
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: zhaochamyu
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you would like to see.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## 🌸 Proposed Solution
Describe how you imagine this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## 🖼️ Mockups / Examples
If you have any visual ideas, sketches, or examples from other projects, share them here.

## 📊 Impact
How many users do you think would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Just me
- [ ] Small group of users
- [ ] Most users

## 📝 Additional Context
Any other context or screenshots about the feature request.
